resources.string: You can still log in with your password, if biometrics are not working
The biometrics usage is temporarily locked. You can try to enable them at a later time.
Would you like to activate biometrics to unlock the app?
You can continue to use your code if it does not work with Biometrics.
Please try again in a few minutes.
Something went wrong with the wallet
Log in to the swiyu app
You won’t be able to restore or report this activity anymore.
The trust status of the issuer reflects the time when the activity occurred and may have changed since then.
The trust status of the verifier reflects the time when the activity occurred and may have changed since then.
The status of the credential reflects the time when the activity occurred and may have changed since then.
The history of your activities is turned off. To keep track of your activities edit it in the main settings.
You’ll see your history here once credentials activities have been made.

Hint: Only share your data if you trust %1$s For example, if you believe that %2$s is requesting too much data, you may file a report. The Federal Office of Justice will then initiate a review procedure and, if necessary, take further measures.
%s is solely registered in the base registry
Based on this information the Confederation does not know who they are. Improper use of the Infrastructure can be examined.

Hint: Only share your data if you trust %1$s. For example, if you believe that %2$s is requesting too much data, you may file a report. The Federal Office of Justice will then initiate a review procedure and, if necessary, take further measures.
%s is registered in the base and trust registry.
The Confederation has verified their entries.
%s is a legitimate issuer of this credential.
%s is a legitimate verifier of this credential.

Hint: Only share your data if you trust %1$s. For example, if you believe that %2$s is requesting too much data, you may file a report. The Federal Office of Justice will then initiate a review procedure and, if necessary, take further measures.
%s is using the infrastructure in a non-compliant manner.

Hint: Only share your data if you trust %1$s For example, if you believe that %2$s is requesting too much data, you may file a report. The Federal Office of Justice will then initiate a review procedure and, if necessary, take further measures. An exclusion from the registries is not possible.
%s is registered neither in the base nor the trust registry.
The Confederation possesses no information about their trustworthiness.
%s is not a legitimate issuer of this credential.
%s is not a legitimate verifier of this credential.

plurals.name: tk_changepassword_error1_android_note2
plurals.item: The password is incorrect. You have %s attempt remaining.
The password is incorrect. You have %s attempts remaining.

resources.string: We’re unable to complete your request right now. This might be due to a temporary connection or system issue.
This credential, along with all associated data, will be completely deleted from this device.

Once issued, a credential cannot be changed.

If you notice an error in your data, please contact the issuer.
They can issue a new, corrected credential.
This wallet app is not supported
Please use the official swiyu app or another compatible wallet app.
We’re checking your device in the background to make sure everything’s safe and works smoothly.
Something went wrong with attestation service.
Something went wrong in the e-ID request
The attestations service can\'t be reached
Something went wrong in the e-ID request
For security reasons, certain technical requirements must be met. Unfortunately, this is not possible with this device.
Unfortunately, this device is not supported
Something went wrong in the e-ID request
Something went wrong in the preparation of the e-ID request
Select one of the listed documents to proof your eligibility. Only original and valid documents will be accepted. (deepl)
Your MRZ data is being prepared and sent for validation.
How your phone reads the passport

• Hold Passport against the back of your device
• Move slowly until a signal is detected
• Keep still until the process finishes

If it doesn’t work:
• Adjust the position and try again
• Remove your phone case
Hold your device close to the document.
Passport could not be read.\n\nPlease hold it steady against the phone and try again.
Document scanning failed multiple times. You can continue without scanning.\n\nYou may be asked to confirm possession of your document in a later step.
NFC is turned off on your device. Please enable NFC in the system settings.
Identity verification required for issuing the e-ID

To issue the e-ID for your child or the person you are supporting, identity verification is required.\n\nFor the next steps, your child or the person you are supporting needs to be present for biometric verification.
You don’t have the required credential in your wallet to continue. To proceed, please set up your electronic identity first.
We are getting the verification data
This QR code cannot be used.
This credential cannot be added to the swiyu app.
This identity check requires a specific credential, which is not available in your wallet.
This QR code is no longer valid, please create a new one.
This proof cannot be saved because protection is not guaranteed on this device.
Via the following link, you will be redirected to an external website where you can create Beta-IDs.\n\nAfterwards, you can import them and test the swiyu app with them.
Add a Beta-ID to test the swiyu app.
Consent has been provided, your request is in the queue.
Your electronic identity is currently in the queue.\n\nAs soon as it’s your turn, you will receive a notification via the app.
Consent is missing, your e-ID is in the queue.

Your electronic identity is currently in the queue.

As soon as it’s your turn, you will receive a notification via the app.

Your parents’ or legal guardian’s consent is still missing.
Please verify your identity by %s, otherwise your order will be canceled.\n\nYour parents’ or legal guardian’s consent is still missing. You need to obtain the consent first in order to proceed.
We attach great importance to the protection of your data and your privacy. To create an e-ID, we require your consent to the data protection declaration.

Unfortunately, your ordering deadline has expired.

Reason: Your legal representative did not approve the order.

You can place a new order at any time.
QR code. Have the parent or guardian scan or share this code
An error occurred while generating the QR code.
Your parent or guardian must scan the QR code with their own swiyu app to give consent for you.
We need the consent of the parents or guardian to create this ID.
How would you like to proceed?
Do you have a comprehensive guardianship?
Comprehensive guardianship means that another person (not your parents) makes all important decisions for you.
First your identity document will be checked. Then your identity will be verified.\n\nIt takes about 5 minutes.
Exceptions\nProtecting your identity is our top priority. In rare cases, we may need to carry out an additional check to verify your identity. This can take several days more.\n
You did not fully complete the ordering process. Please restart it to receive your e-ID.
Your e-ID will probably be ready on %s. We will notify you as soon as it is ready.
Your electronic identity is currently in the queue.\nYour parents’ or legal guardian’s consent is still missing.
Please verify your identity by 10. January 2025, at 10:07 AM, otherwise your order will be canceled.\nYour parents’ or legal guardian’s consent is still missing.
Your e-ID is ready. Please start the identification process by %s at the latest.
Your e-ID is here. Just tap your credential in the list to activate it.
Unable to retrieve the status status of your e-ID order.
Your identity is being carefully verified. This may take several business days. You’ll be notified as soon as the process is complete.
Verification of %s identity was not successful.
Unfortunately, we were unable to verify the identity. Tap ‘Learn more’ for further information.
Please select your devices and verify your identity to complete your e-ID order.
Please verify your identity to complete your e-ID order.
Your identity is being carefully verified. This may take several business days. You’ll be notified as soon as the process is complete.
The e-ID order for %s was canceled.
The ordering process was not completed. Please order a new e-ID.
The e-ID order for %s is closed.
We have received your request. Unfortunately, your order can\'t be processed immediately due to high demand. \n\nAs soon as it is your turn, you will receive a message via the app.
Consent has been provided, you can start now with the verification process.
Please have a valid ID ready.
Welcome back – Final verification of your e-ID
The next steps is to make sure that you really are the person who has the ID. Therefore, have your ID ready. We will make video recording of it and a selfie from you.
Tip\nPlease take a few minutes and do not cancel the process, otherwise all the information will be lost.
Please have your ID ready. A short video of your face and the ID will be recorded.
Tip\nPlease take a few minutes and do not cancel the process, otherwise all the information will be lost.
Confirm your identity – Record a short video
A short video of your face helps confirm your identity. Make sure your face is well lit and clearly visible. When you are ready, press \'Proceed\' to continue the process.
Get your devices and set up your e-ID on this or additional devices.\n\nYou won\'t be able to add other devices once you continue.
Would you like to use your e-ID on multiple devices?
Scan the QR code. To identify or add credentials.
Sorry, the swiyu app is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
The password is incorrect. Please try again.
Please enter your swiyu password to activate biometric unlocking.
Please enter your swiyu password to disable biometric unlocking.
During a data request, more information about me was requested than necessary.
What would you like to report?
Attention: Until the official launch of swiyu, reports will not be reviewed, and verifiers will therefore not be sanctioned for misconduct.\nThe categories are not final yet.
Providing your email address is optional and it will only be used to communicate about the case.
Please describe the incident as precisely as possible…
Please enter a valid email address.
In the next step, record your report for the responsible authority. Please also specify which data was requested without authorization.
Your personal data will remain anonymous, and only the essential information will be transmitted for analysis.
Contribute anonymously to improving the app
Take advantage of an app tailored to your needs. Do you want to share your anonymous user data with the development team in return?
Biometric unlocking is not activated for this device.
Biometric unlocking is not activated for this app.
Please activate biometric unlocking in your settings.
Try to activate biometric unlocking later.
Do you want to use your face or fingerprint to unlock the app?
If biometric unlocking does not work, you can still use your password.
Your swiyu app now has optimal protection against unauthorised access.
Keep track of every credential you’ve received and the data you’ve shared. This data is only stored locally on your phone and you can turn it off anytime in the settings.
Thanks to the swiyu app, you always have your ID with you on your mobile phone.
Welcome to the onboarding for the swiyu app.
Your ID data is encrypted and stored locally in the swiyu app on your mobile phone.
You have control over who can check your ID data, and when. No access without permission.
The passwords do not match. Please try again.
Incorrect password entered too many times. Please set a new password.
Secure the app with a password
Protect your app from unauthorised access.
Password must be at least 6 characters
Failed to set up the password
Your settings are being applied. This may take up to 30 seconds.
Please check the validity of your credential.
Your details have been successfully transmitted.
Do you want to share your data with an unknown verifier?
This verifier is not part of the swiyu ecosystem. The trustworthiness can not be ensured. Would you like to proceed?
Your data has been sent to the verifier and is being checked.
Verification has failed. Please try again later or contact support.
Your data could not be processed.
To identify yourself or add IDs and documents.
The camera is an important function. Without a camera, you cannot receive IDs and documents or identify yourself.
Camera access has expired. Please allow access again.
Please go to Settings and allow access.\n\nWithout a camera, you cannot receive IDs and documents or identify yourself.
Are you sure you want to accept a credential from an unknown issuer?
This issuer is not part of the swiyu ecosystem. The trustworthiness can not be ensured. Would you like to proceed?
Would like to issue the following credential:

Once issued, a credential cannot be changed.

If you notice an error in your data, please contact the issuer.
They can issue a new, corrected credential.
If you decline the credential now, it will immediately become invalid.\n\nYou must then request a new credential.
You won\'t be able to restore or report these activities anymore
If you turn off the history, future activities for all credential won\'t be saved. You won\'t be able to check or report these activities anymore.
Existing history will be kept unless you delete them.

When sharing diagnostic data, the swiyu app occasionally sends anonymous, non-personal information. This data helps us to continuously improve the app and fix errors more quickly. It cannot be traced back to you personally.

Information transmitted anonymously includes:
The swiyu app is open source. Its source code can be viewed on GitHub.
The authors accept no liability for the reliability and completeness of the information. We are not responsible for references and links to third-party websites.
Federal Department of Finance FDF\nFederal Office of Information Technology, Systems and Telecommunication FOITT

Here you will find an overview of the software licences used by the swiyu app.\nThe licences comply with the FOITT privacy guidelines and the latest security standards. We would like to create transparency for our users with this list.
The device has no compatible biometric hardware.
Your biometrics have been deactivated because you changed your code.
Help us make the app even better by anonymously sharing error messages and crashes.
To use this app, your device must be secured. Please enable a screen lock (e.g., PIN, passphrase, or pattern) in your phone settings.
You will only be able to use the app after device security has been activated.
The data couldn’t be processed. Please check your connection and try again.\n\nIf the issue continues, contact the support for assistance.
The verification criteria were not met, so the e‑ID request could not be completed.\n\nFor more information, please refer to the FAQ.
Choose where you want to receive your e-ID
Set up your e-ID on this or additional devices. You won’t be able to change this later.
Open the wallet app on the device you want to add and scan the one-time QR code. When scanning is done, continue on this device and wait until this screen gets updated.
An error occurred while generating the QR code.
QR code. Scan it with other device
We couldn\'t pair the device due to an unexpected error.\nPlease try again or contact our support team for further assistance.
Your 30-minute window to add additional devices for issuing your eID has expired.\n\nPlease restart the verification.
Sensitive data has been requested from you. Decline the transaction if you do not wish to share this information.
Data has been requested from you. Decline the transaction if you do not wish to share this information.
You have reached the maximum number of devices that can be added.
We’re verifying your identity - thank you for your patience.
This process may take several business days. You’ll be notified as soon as it’s complete.
The scanned document does not match the one you used to request your e-ID.\n\nPlease scan the same document again to verify ownership.

• Place the document on a flat surface
• Avoid direct light or reflections
• Align the document within the overlay
• Hold your device steady while capturing
• Repeat the process for the back side
Scan the page with your signature
Scan the 2nd page of your passport with your signature.
Scan the back of your card
Turn your card over and scan the side with the code at the bottom.

• Hold your document
• Avoid direct light or reflections
• Align the document within the overlay
• Move and tilt the document slightly
• Repeat the process for the back side
This function is not included in the SDK.
MRZ composite check digit is invalid.
MRZ first name field is invalid.
MRZ last name field is invalid.
Failed to capture face image from the document.
Final package data for upload is missing.
Second page required to read the MRZ.
The document is too far away.
The document image appears to be from a screen.
NFC backend hash algorithm not supported.
NFC backend failed to encode the face photo.
NFC backend failed to encode the signature photo.
NFC backend failed to parse DG1.
NFC backend failed to parse DG11.
NFC backend failed to parse DG12.
NFC backend failed to parse DG2.
NFC backend failed to parse DG7.
NFC backend failed to parse SOD.
More than one NFC tag found.
NFC is not supported on this device.
NFC session invalidated by the user.
PDF document access denied or invalid file path.
PDF document is damaged or has an invalid format.
Please wait while the data is decrypted.
Please wait while the data is encrypted.
Device integrity check failed. Please use a secure device.
Position your document within the frame.
Liveness check failed. Please try again with natural movement.
Move your head slightly to the left.
Move your head slightly to the right.
Tilt your head slightly to the left.
Tilt your head slightly to the right.
Hold your head position and wait.
Position your face within the oval frame.
Face verification failed. Please try again with better lighting.
Look directly at the camera for verification.
Position the document correctly within the frame.
Make sure both sides of the document match.
Hold your device closer to the document.
Hold your device farther away from the document.
Make sure the MRZ area is visible and clear.
Keep the document on the same side.
Keep the document on the same side to read the MRZ.
Turn the document to the other side.
Turn the document to scan the back side.
Make sure the document is clearly visible and well lit.
Position your document within the frame.
Avoid reflections by adjusting light or angle.
Rotate the document slightly to align it correctly.
Rotate your device to match the document orientation.
Rotate both your device and the document.
NFC read failed. Try positioning your device differently.
Hold your device close to the documents NFC chip.
NFC is not available on this device.
Hold your device closer to the QR code.
Hold your device farther away from the QR code.
Point your camera at the QR code.
Keep the document steady during the security check.
Security tracking lost. Please realign the document.
Continue signing within the designated area.
Please wait while the visual zone is processed.
We’re unable to complete your request right now. This might be due to a temporary connection or system issue.
This certificate is still being processed. As soon as it is ready, you can activate and use it.
What do you need to do?
The certificate comes from a particularly secure source. It automatically becomes invalid after import.\n\nOrder a new certificate. The previous certificate will remain invalid.
Please enter your official email address with the domain @federaloffice.admin.ch. Your email address will be used to verify access to the test phase.
A one-time code will be sent to this email address to complete your registration.
The access to the test phase is currently limited to users with an @federaloffice.admin.ch email address.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Registration for the test phase is temporarily not available. We kindly ask you to try again later.
The \"order e-ID\" function is currently being tested and is available to only federal government employees with an email address ending in @federaloffice.admin.ch.
To take part in the test phase, please confirm your eligibility and agree to the terms of use.
Please wait while we set things up.
Didn’t receive it? Check if your entered email address is correct.
The code is valid for 1 hour. Please enter the code to continue.
The code is incorrect. Please try again.
Your code has expired. Please request a new code.
The code could not be verified after multiple attempts.
Please restart the registration to receive a new one-time code.
To transmit your data securely, the app requires an active Bluetooth connection.\n\nThis ensures that everything reaches its destination – encrypted and reliable.
Show your swiyu code to confirm your identity or receive a document or credential.\n\nNo data is shared without consent.
